name: HMS Provost (T 196)
events: 1 May 1945 HrMs Dolfijn (Lt.Cdr. J.B.M.J. Maas, RNN) conducted A/S exercises off Scapa Flow together with HMS Gorse (Skr. F.R. Brown, RNR) and HMS Provost (T/A/Lt.Cdr. R.B. Evans, RNVR).
HrMs Dolfijn also carried out speed trials on the measured mile as well as gunnery exercises. (1)
